variables.name: APP_CONFIG_FILE
variables.description: Environment variable (APP_CONFIG_FILE) that overrides the default config.json path. Supports PyInstaller frozen mode via sys._MEIPASS.

variables.name: APP_LLM_MODEL
variables.description: LLM model name (env override, default: llama3).

variables.name: APP_LLM_BASE_URL
variables.description: Base URL of the OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoint (env override).

variables.name: APP_LLM_API_KEY
variables.description: API key for LLM provider authentication (env override).

variables.name: APP_CHUNK_SIZE
variables.description: Max tokens/characters per chunk (env override, default: 10000).

variables.name: APP_CHUNK_OVERLAP
variables.description: Overlap between adjacent chunks (env override, default: 1500).

variables.name: APP_MAX_WORKERS
variables.description: Number of parallel processing workers (env override, default: 1).

variables.name: APP_OUTPUT_FORMAT
variables.description: Output format for generated markdown files (env override, default: spr). Allowed values: spr, frontmatter, markdown.
